evals.name: claude-chat-and-citations
evals.prompt: Extract a Claude paste with Human and Assistant labels, web citations, Copy controls, and a Project knowledge reference.

expectations.text: Response prefers Human and Assistant labels for role assignment.
Response catalogs web citations as source traces rather than verified facts.
Response marks unsupplied Project knowledge as referenced-not-supplied or unknown.
Response excludes Copy UI chrome from semantic content.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the claude-chat-and-citations scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.

evals.name: claude-artifact-versions
evals.prompt: The Claude thread references three Artifact versions: Markdown, SVG, and React. Only version titles and the latest Markdown body were pasted.

expectations.text: Response catalogs all three Artifact versions as separate elements.
Response assigns verbatim or text-extracted fidelity only to the supplied Markdown body.
Response marks the SVG and React bodies referenced-not-supplied.
Response preserves Artifact version relationships without inventing changes.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the claude-artifact-versions scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.

evals.name: claude-flattened-paste
evals.prompt: Normalize a flattened Claude paste containing an embedded quoted request, a file chip, and no explicit role labels.

expectations.text: Response does not use writing style alone to assign roles.
Response catalogs the file chip separately from message prose.
Response gives alternation-only role assignments low confidence.
Response records ambiguity in Normalization exceptions.

evals.expected_output: A standalone platform-tuned thread-context extract for the claude-flattened-paste scenario that satisfies all four evidence-anchored expectations.
